{"problem_standardized_math":"Implement Algorithm 5.2 and use it to solve linear systems with coefficient matrix \(A\) equal to the Hilbert matrix, whose entries are \(A_{i,j} = \frac{1}{i + j - 1}\). Take the right-hand side to be \(b = (1,1,\\ldots,1)^T\) and the initial point to be \(x_0 = 0\). For \(n = 5, 8, 12, 20\), report the number of iterations required to reduce the residual below \(10^{-6}\)."}
